creator: wollman@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 241981
patch for net-mgmt/yaf and net/libfixbuf

Trying to track down a segfault on my network monitoring probe, I noticed that yaf is quite out-of-date. libfixbuf is less so, but I updated both to see if it would make a difference to the crashes.  I'm running the attached patch now; it passes `poudriere testport` but haven't determined yet whether it fixes the crash. I had to fix some missing includes in libairframe and update the packing list.
